title: An Act to Extend the Maine Lobster Marketing Collaborative to December 31, 2028
last_house_action: 3/26/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/30/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on December 3, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on MARINE RESOURCES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-574) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-574). Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-574) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
